prompt: Which 3 analytics modules have the highest average user rating (with at least 5 ratings)? And which 3 modules have the lowest average rating (with at least 3 ratings)? For each, show the module name, average rating, and a sample review title.
output:
| Module Name | Average Rating | Sample Review Title |
|---|---|---|
| Data Visualization Suite | 4.8 | "Intuitive dashboards and export options" |
| Predictive Analytics Engine | 4.7 | "Accurate forecasting with minimal setup" |
| Customer Segmentation Tool | 4.6 | "Great for targeting niche audiences" |
| Legacy Reporting Module | 2.1 | "Frequent crashes and outdated interface" |
| Basic Survey Builder | 2.4 | "Limited customization and slow support" |
| Manual Data Entry Add-on | 2.6 | "Time-consuming and error-prone" |
